tests.name: Cover the words
tests.pass: Shape alone distinguishes controls, status, and selection.

tests.name: Squint
tests.pass: Every measured altitude is 2.0 or better.

tests.name: Flip the register
tests.pass: Changing only data-register swaps day and flight-deck with no unresolved color.

tests.name: Count the golds
tests.pass: At most one gold detail appears on a surface.

tests.name: Check the floors
tests.pass: Every value has a unit and every applicable type and contrast floor passes.

tests.name: Empty is correct
tests.pass: No element exists only to occupy room and quiet groups collapse honestly.

tests.name: Every string would ship
tests.pass: Every string has provenance and the tells scan has zero unwaived flags.
